topic: Indian-origin NASA astronaut Anil Menon begins first mission to International Space Station
headline: NASA ASTRONAUT ANIL MENON BLASTS OFF ON FIRST MISSION TO INTERNATIONAL SPACE STATION, ARRIVES AT ISS ON JULY 15
summary: Indian-origin NASA astronaut Anil Menon has begun his first mission to the International Space Station (ISS) aboard the Soyuz MS-29 expedition. Menon, a colonel in the United States Space Force and emergency medicine physician, arrived at the ISS on July 15, 2026. Born in Minneapolis, Minnesota, to an Indian immigrant father and a Ukrainian immigrant mother, Menon was previously a flight surgeon at NASA and medical director at SpaceX. He was selected as a NASA astronaut candidate and has now embarked on his maiden voyage to the ISS.
